title: Iran closes Strait of Hormuz again; 2 ships report attacks while trying to cross
summary_full: India said it summoned Iran’s Ambassador in New Delhi, conveying concerns over “a shooting incident" in the strait involving two Indian-flagged ships.
summary_public: India said it summoned Iran’s Ambassador in New Delhi, conveying concerns over “a shooting incident" in the strait involving two Indian-flagged ships.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran closes Strait of Hormuz again; 2 ships report attacks
